ev_silent: The Penmarrow Dam holds back a reservoir feeding the entire Lessit valley.

ev_silent: The astronomer Telford Wynne mapped the dust lanes of the Orrin Nebula from the Sennett array.

ev_silent: The clockmaker Felix Ondry built the chiming carillon in the Brae Cathedral tower.

claim: The submarine Latchkey was launched from the Verren Drydock in the spring trials.

claim: The engineer Cobb Trennick holds the patent for the Helverson valve assembly.

ev_silent: The jeweler Esme Vandry set the famed Corrigan opal into a ceremonial collar.

claim: The satellite Brindlecorr was placed in a polar orbit by the Velsom launch consortium.
